title: galium mollugo var. rigidum
intro: Galium mollugo var. rigidum, also known as the rigid bedstraw, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Galium mollugo var. rigidum include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and anxiety, due to its ability to relax muscles and reduce inflammation. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
